item.title: Disney Fantasia Mini Golf: Holes 16-18
item.description: Watch the final holes of the Disney Fantasia mini golf course. Holes 16-18 bring tricky shots, magical obstacles, and exciting hole-in-one attempts for a thrilling finish.

media:content.media:title: Disney Fantasia Mini Golf: Holes 16-18
media:content.media:description: Watch the final holes of the Disney Fantasia mini golf course. Holes 16-18 bring tricky shots, magical obstacles, and exciting hole-in-one attempts for a thrilling finish.

item.title: I Can’t Get Over This Shot
item.description: Watch an incredible shot that leaves everyone amazed. Perfect precision, skill, and timing come together for a moment that’s unforgettable on the course.

media:content.media:title: I Can’t Get Over This Shot
media:content.media:description: Watch an incredible shot that leaves everyone amazed. Perfect precision, skill, and timing come together for a moment that’s unforgettable on the course.

item.title: Disney Fantasia Mini Golf: Holes 13-15
item.description: Watch Holes 13-15 on the Disney Fantasia mini golf course. Enjoy tricky shots, magical obstacles, and exciting hole-in-one attempts in this fun, themed match.

media:content.media:title: Disney Fantasia Mini Golf: Holes 13-15
media:content.media:description: Watch Holes 13-15 on the Disney Fantasia mini golf course. Enjoy tricky shots, magical obstacles, and exciting hole-in-one attempts in this fun, themed match.

item.title: Welcome to Smuggler’s Cove Mini Golf
item.description: Step into Smuggler’s Cove mini golf and explore fun, challenging holes. Watch exciting putts, creative shots, and attempts at hole-in-ones throughout the course.

media:content.media:title: Welcome to Smuggler’s Cove Mini Golf
media:content.media:description: Step into Smuggler’s Cove mini golf and explore fun, challenging holes. Watch exciting putts, creative shots, and attempts at hole-in-ones throughout the course.

item.title: Disney Fantasia Mini Golf: Holes 4-6
item.description: Watch Holes 4-6 on the Disney Fantasia mini golf course. Tackle fun obstacles, make precise shots, and enjoy thrilling hole-in-one attempts in this magical match.

media:content.media:title: Disney Fantasia Mini Golf: Holes 4-6
media:content.media:description: Watch Holes 4-6 on the Disney Fantasia mini golf course. Tackle fun obstacles, make precise shots, and enjoy thrilling hole-in-one attempts in this magical match.

item.title: This Hard Mini Golf Course Frustrated Us
item.description: Watch our struggle on a challenging mini golf course. Tricky holes, tough obstacles, and frustrating shots make this round a test of patience and skill.

media:content.media:title: This Hard Mini Golf Course Frustrated Us
media:content.media:description: Watch our struggle on a challenging mini golf course. Tricky holes, tough obstacles, and frustrating shots make this round a test of patience and skill.

item.title: Frankie’s Fun Park Mini Golf: Holes 31-33
item.description: Join the action on Holes 31-33 at Frankie’s Fun Park mini golf. Exciting shots, tricky obstacles, and thrilling hole-in-one attempts make this round a fun challenge.

media:content.media:title: Frankie’s Fun Park Mini Golf: Holes 31-33
media:content.media:description: Join the action on Holes 31-33 at Frankie’s Fun Park mini golf. Exciting shots, tricky obstacles, and thrilling hole-in-one attempts make this round a fun challenge.

item.title: Unbelievable Mini Golf Shot
item.description: Watch an incredible mini golf shot that leaves everyone stunned. Precision, skill, and perfect timing combine for a truly unforgettable moment on the course.

media:content.media:title: Unbelievable Mini Golf Shot
media:content.media:description: Watch an incredible mini golf shot that leaves everyone stunned. Precision, skill, and perfect timing combine for a truly unforgettable moment on the course.

item.title: Frankie’s Fun Park Mini Golf: Holes 28-30
item.description: Watch Holes 28-30 at Frankie’s Fun Park mini golf. Challenging shots, fun obstacles, and exciting hole-in-one attempts make this round a thrilling experience.
